ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county the zip code belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the zip code location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the zip code location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zip code area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zip code in square miles */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city the zip code belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the zip code data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "walkability_scores" (
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code associated with the walk score */,
  "walk_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the walkability of the area (0-100) */,
  "transit_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the availability and quality of public transit */,
  "street_connectivity" INTEGER /* Score representing the connectivity of streets */,
  "pedestrian_safety" INTEGER /* Score representing the safety for pedestrians */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the walk score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikeability_scores" (
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code associated with the bike score */,
  "bike_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the bikeability of the area (0-100) */,
  "bikeway_type" TEXT /* Type of bikeways (e.g., dedicated lanes, shared lanes) */,
  "bikeway_length" REAL /* Total length of bikeways in the zip code */,
  "bikeway_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of bikeways (e.g., maintenance, condition) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the bike score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county's population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level achieved in the county */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups in the county */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities in the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues_reported" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported issue */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code where the issue was reported */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of mobility issue (e.g., missing sidewalk, bike lane needed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reported issue */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the issue status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., walkability analysis, bikeability trends) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code related to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, citizen) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code related to the accessed data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code where the project is located */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "expected_completion" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the project data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_improvement_projects_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving funding */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., state grant, local budget) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated */,
  "funding_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the funding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the funding data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES improvement_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborating agency or organization */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code related to the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., public-private partnership) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, public database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
